历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20047 → 19205 → 18978 → 22433 → 26287. From 2021 to 2023, it remained stable around 19,000–20,000, then shifted to about 22,433 in 2024, and further to about 26,287 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7,300 over the past two years, showing an accelerating trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 26,287. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 199 in 2021, 201 in 2022, 204 in 2023, 220 in 2024, and 197 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 202, an increase of 5 students (about +2.5%) compared to 2025, a small expansion with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 21st in 2021 and remained stable at 22nd from 2022 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier universities in China, with sustained strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly affected by the lingering public opinion from the early 'companion incident'. On Douyin, it has high popularity (ranked 20th overall), with high short video exposure and still high application attention. In 2022, there was a gap in enrollment in Shaanxi; in 2023, the ranking of Journalism and Communication majors dropped by 6,414 places; in 2024, the science admission score line in Sichuan dropped by 63 points, with many historical abnormal signals, but no systematic gap overall. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has A+ in Mathematics, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Foreign Languages and Literatures, A in Control Science and Engineering, A in Marxist Theory, and A- in Clinical Medicine, A- in Law, A- in Physics, A- in Materials Science and Engineering, totaling 19 disciplines at A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain consistently hot, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from about 216,000 in 2021 to about 363,000 in 2025, with continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates is about 609,800, with an estimated Physics Category of about 366,000 based on recent proportions, further expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition. 7. [Geographical Factor] Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, adjacent to Hebei Province, with strong regional preference. The university has a large enrollment scale in Hebei Province (about 200 in Physics Category), making it a key province for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the accelerating backward trend of historical rankings in the past two years, the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province, the rising provincial control line indicating intensified competition, and the slight mitigating effect of a small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2.5%), the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward based on the 2025 baseline of 26,287. The predicted minimum ranking is about 26,887, with a range of 26,387–27,387.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 21st in 2021 and remained stable at 22nd from 2022 to 2026, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the early 'study companion incident' on public opinion. Its Douyin popularity is high (ranked 20th overall), indicating sustained high application attention. Historical admission anomaly signals are mainly concentrated in the Physics Category, with no obvious gaps recorded in the History Category. Strong disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literatures (A), Marxist Theory (A), Law (A-), and Archaeology (A-), with outstanding strength in humanities and history, which strongly attracts History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a wait-and-see state of differentiation, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, which matches the university's History Category enrollment majors (Law Class, Chinese Language and Literature Class, Economics Class, Journalism and Communication Class, etc.). The number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province was approximately 202,000 in 2021 → 244,000 in 2025, a slight increase. In 2026, the total number of candidates is about 609,800, and based on recent proportions, History Category candidates are estimated at about 244,000, essentially flat. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) fluctuated from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, a slight increase. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, adjacent to Hebei Province, with strong regional preference. The History Category enrollment scale is about 47–48 students, which is medium-sized.

预测结论.text: Considering that the historical rankings have stabilized in the 1400–1447 range in the past two years, the enrollment plan is essentially unchanged, and the number of History Category candidates is stable, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will continue its stable trend. 历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Shandong University's medical category in Hebei Province over the past five years are: 2021: 20047 (planned 38 students), 2022: 19205 (planned 37 students), 2023: 18978 (planned 33 students), 2024: 22433 (planned 36 students), 2025: 26287 (planned 34 students). Rankings steadily increased slightly from 2021 to 2023 (from 20047 to 18978), but dropped significantly from 2024 to 22433, and further dropped to 26287 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of 5854 places over two years, indicating a marked intensification of competition for medical admissions. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 30 students, a decrease of 4 from 2025's 34, a reduction of approximately 11.76%, which will further heighten competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines include Qilu Medical College, and specialties such as clinical medicine and stomatology enjoy high reputations nationwide, maintaining a sustained appeal to Hebei Province candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have seen rising popularity nationwide in recent years, with core specialties like clinical medicine and stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, adjacent to Hebei, offering convenient geographical location and transportation, making it an important choice for Hebei candidates applying to medical institutions. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is reduced to 30 students, further exacerbating the supply-demand imbalance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculations and recent ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Hebei Province in 2026 is approximately 24482, an improvement over 2025 (smaller ranking number), mainly due to the reduction in enrollment plan. The expected admission ranking range is between 24286 and 24678.
